_doc: MAINTAINER-ONLY, READ-ONLY, FAIL-OPEN codebase-map orientation entry for Claude Code in the aidazi framework repo. OUTSIDE the vendor allowlist (vendor-framework.sh copies only its INCLUDE list) -> never lands in adopters. ONLY a UserPromptSubmit context-injector: on a substantive coding-task prompt it runs maintainer/map_briefing.py (read-only) which prints a compact STRUCTURAL briefing to stdout (Claude injects it). NO PreToolUse/PostToolUse hook, NO SessionStart gate, NO receipt/epoch/mutation-ledger -> it can NEVER deny or delay Edit/Write/Bash/commit/subagent/worktree/cross-repo. The command is wrapped so it ALWAYS exits 0 even if the script is missing (fail-open at the command level, not just inside the script), and map_briefing.py itself always exits 0.
